title: Third Project in Pennsylvania: Waga Energy Pursues its Dynamic Position in North America
content: Waga Energy and the Southeastern Chester County Refuse Authority (SECCRA), a municipal authority in charge of waste management in southern Chester County, have signed a 20-year contract to produce RNG (Renewable Natural Gas) at the West Grove storage site in Pennsylvania. The West Grove site, managed by SECCRA, processes waste from 24 municipalities and townships, representing a population of 105,000. It has an annual processing capacity of 150,000 tons of waste.
author: Analysts Account
